$comment: SOURCE OF TRUTH for the Architecture contract container. Rules stay empty until a migrated slice needs one and Jon ratifies it. Dependency allowlist data lives here.
title: Architecture
summary: Architecture contract container for stack, dependency policy, repo/process, secrets, toolchain, validation, and deploy posture rules.

apps/web.summary: Static React workbench frontend aligned to the JWC/Chattr agent workbench direction and themed to the kai-chattr token contract.
apps/web.runtime: Vite static build deployed from apps/web/dist to Cloudflare Pages.

services/api.summary: Python API and agent-control backend for chat, MCP bridge, runtime events, persistence, and agent wrappers.
services/api.runtime: uv-managed Python 3.11+ ASGI service served by Uvicorn.

enforcedBy: Pending Jon-ratified rules. Dependency allowlist data lives in this Architecture contract.
openItems: No architecture rules are locked in this file yet.

The apps/web component foundation rule is locked in governance/contracts/frontend.json. This Architecture contract keeps the broad shadcn/ui and Vercel AI Elements dependency allowance; do not narrow it to only components used by the first starter page.
Pydantic is the backend validation contract; add frontend schema validation only when a concrete browser-side form or runtime guard requires it.
